violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Food Safety Manager license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Food safety certificate current. Application provided during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Hot water not available during time of inspection. PIC states hot water heater needs repair/ replacement. Establishment was boiling water to use for sanitation prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC just took food safety course yesterday. Once certificate is obtained, PIC to register a Rhode Island Food Safety Manager. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The door to the toilet room (that opens into a food preparation area) is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
